New site webmasters, will help us to keep the site more updated and with more news. Flash layout Report... Here is the current % done if the flash layout.

Welcome to DBGT |dot| com. We are proud to announce our new layout along with new, and more and even better contents. Now that the new and hopefully final layout is done, we will put our hour works on the Flash layout, and that will happen in part thanks to the new webmasters that will help our site continue updating and being the best resource for fans.
Along with the appearance, the site has modified it's structure a bit and will continue changing and modifying due to internal changes. DBGT.COM is growing and this will be reflected constantly on the web site.
We have also added more 'technology' to our HTML codes, so now the requirements may be higher: we recommend using Internet Explorer 5, or Netscape 6, in any color mode but in 800x600.
We hope you like the new site, and we also hope you'll send us feedback about the site.
Thanks for supporting us, and keep coming cause more updates are coming soon!

 


Please help us out by visiting our sponsor.

Updated:
10/15/00
